---
title: "Contact Info"
---

## Get In Touch

If you're interested in collaborating or want to discuss data analytics opportunities, feel free to reach out.

- **Email**: {{< fa envelope >}} augustinemeeval@gmail.com
- **Phone**: {{< fa phone >}} +353-892038335
- **Address**: {{< fa home >}} 109 Parnell Road, Dublin 1
- **LinkedIn**: {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [linkedin.com/in/meeval-augustine-60518323a](https://www.linkedin.com/in/meeval-augustine-60518323a)
- **GitHub**: {{< fa brands github >}} [github.com/Meeval20](https://github.com/Meeval20)

::: {.callout-important}
Please reach out to me directly if you need formal letters of recommendation or further details regarding my portfolio.
:::
